title: Commercial Manager – Major Infrastructure Project
description:
• Employment type: Project-based, with opportunity to transfer to future projects

  • Bonus: 13th-month AWS (no variable bonus)

  • Working hours:

    • Weekdays: 8:00am – 6:00pm

    • Alternate Saturdays: 8:00am – 4:00pm

  • Transport: Company pick-up provided from Tanah Merah MRT


Our Client is a leading engineering and construction organisation delivering complex, large-scale infrastructure and industrial projects across the Asia-Pacific region, with a strong focus on safety, governance, and commercial excellence.


Key Responsibilities

Commercial & Contract Management

  • Take full ownership of all commercial and contractual activities for the project until final account settlement.

  • Administer and manage the Head Contract, subcontractor, and supplier agreements.

  • Ensure all contractual obligations, deliverables, variations, and claims are properly managed and closed.

  • Lead contractual close-out, including final accounts, variation settlements, and final payments.

Claims, Variations & Disputes

  • Lead all variation and claims management activities, including preparation, negotiation, and settlement.

  • Provide timely notification and escalation of potential claims and commercial risks.

  • Manage contractual disputes in accordance with agreed dispute resolution procedures.

  • Coordinate with regional commercial leadership on complex dispute matters.

Risk, Cost & Financial Oversight

  • Monitor cost control, cash flow forecasting, and monthly commercial forecasts.

  • Maintain and update risk and opportunity registers, converting opportunities into measurable outcomes.

  • Support the review of monthly project financial reports.

Advisory & Stakeholder Engagement

  • Act as the key commercial advisor to the Project Manager and Project Team.

  • Draft and review contractual correspondence, legal letters, amendments, claims, and formal notices.

  • Participate in commercial negotiations with clients, subcontractors, and consultants.

  • Maintain accurate contractual records, correspondence, and commercial documentation.

Governance, Training & Compliance

  • Ensure compliance with company commercial policies, procedures, and applicable legislation.
  • Coordinate insurance coverage, bonds, and securities with internal legal and insurance teams.
  • Deliver regular contract awareness and commercial training to the Project Team.
  • Support audits and continuous improvement initiatives across commercial standards.


Requirements

  • Minimum 10 years’ experience in commercial / contractual management within large-scale engineering or construction projects.
  • Proven experience managing high-value contracts (similar scale to $100M projects).
  • Strong background in contract administration, claims, variations, and dispute management.
  • Excellent negotiation skills and confidence in client-facing commercial discussions.
  • Strong capability in drafting legal and contractual correspondence.
  • Relevant tertiary qualifications; formal legal training highly advantageous.


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now”.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Stafflink Services Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
STAFFLINK SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED

Stafflink Services is an enterprising human resource provider that offers a wide range of recruitment solutions for companies across all industries.

At the core of Stafflink is a team of committed and proficient recruitment consultants.  With their varies background and working experiences, clients of diverse industries can be assured of competent and personalised recruitment services that go beyond the mundane.

Here at Stafflink, we relentlessly place the interests of both clients and candidates as our top priority.  Not only do we value candidates as our key assets, we also take immense pride in servicing our clients.  By carefully understanding their needs and providing apt solutions, we strive to foster enduring relationships, all achieved with the exemplary service standard that Stafflink has set itself upon.
